kept.title: Divide and Translate: Compositional First-Order Logic Translation and Verification for Complex Logical Reasoning
kept.reason: Neurosymbolic method using LLMs for formal logic translation, verified by SAT solver for reliable reasoning.

kept.title: Planning Anything with Rigor: General-Purpose Zero-Shot Planning with LLM-based Formalized Programming
kept.reason: LLM tool-use for formal planning; frames problems as code-based optimization, aligning with structured reasoning for correctness.

kept.title: Multi-modal Agent Tuning: Building a VLM-Driven Agent for Efficient Tool Usage
kept.reason: Presents method for tuning VLM agents for tool use, relevant to LLM-based agents for code tasks.

kept.title: Monitoring Latent World States in Language Models with Propositional Probes
kept.reason: Probes extract latent logical propositions from LM states; connects to monitoring faithfulness for code correctness.
